scripts.tauri:dev: pnpm sidecar && set -a && . ./.env.local && set +a && tauri dev
scripts.sidecar: swift build --package-path capture-sidecar -c release && mkdir -p src-tauri/bin src-tauri/target/debug/bin && cp capture-sidecar/.build/release/PeerCapture src-tauri/bin/PeerCapture-aarch64-apple-darwin && cp capture-sidecar/.build/release/PeerCapture src-tauri/target/debug/bin/PeerCapture-aarch64-apple-darwin && codesign --force --sign - --identifier dev.aaronzhang.peer.capture -r='designated => identifier "dev.aaronzhang.peer.capture"' src-tauri/bin/PeerCapture-aarch64-apple-darwin && codesign --force --sign - --identifier dev.aaronzhang.peer.capture -r='designated => identifier "dev.aaronzhang.peer.capture"' src-tauri/target/debug/bin/PeerCapture-aarch64-apple-darwin
